description_long: This airplane features a highly angular, futuristic design with a dark metallic body accented by vivid green highlights and subtle gray striping. Its wings are sharply swept back and extend outward with pronounced, needle-like tips, giving it a predatory, high-speed appearance. The fuselage is slender and tapers to a fine point at both the nose and tail, with a cockpit area that is seamlessly integrated into the forward section. The tail assembly is split into two vertical stabilizers that angle outward, enhancing its aggressive silhouette. The surface appears smooth and sleek, with minimal visible panel lines or rivets, suggesting advanced construction techniques. No visible landing gear or engine intakes are apparent, emphasizing a streamlined, possibly conceptual or stealth-oriented design.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers, and a dark metallic finish accented by green highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide angular wings, and twin vertical stabilizers flaring outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slender, elongated fuselage and the extreme sweep of the wings and tail fins.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the split tail design and the symmetry of the wing and stabilizer arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the streamlined profile and pointed extremities.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, needle-like wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine type not apparent from exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration, angled outward from the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated smoothly into the fuselage with a single canopy.
